Library: https://github.com/Waissi/fmodlua-library
clone: git@github.com:Waissi/fmodlua-library.git

Library is for FMOD version 2.02

Version 2.03 has:
 grep -R "F_CALLBACK" $LINUX_API/core/inc
/home/mike/code/FMOD/fmodstudioapi20313linux/api//core/inc/fmod.cs:    public delegate float  CB_3D_ROLLOFF_CALLBACK   (IntPtr channelcontrol, float distance);
/home/mike/code/FMOD/fmodstudioapi20313linux/api//core/inc/fmod.cs:        public RESULT set3DRolloffCallback(CB_3D_ROLLOFF_CALLBACK callback)
/home/mike/code/FMOD/fmodstudioapi20313linux/api//core/inc/fmod.cs:        private static extern RESULT FMOD5_System_Set3DRolloffCallback      (IntPtr system, CB_3D_ROLLOFF_CALLBACK callback);
/home/mike/code/FMOD/fmodstudioapi20313linux/api//core/inc/fmod.h:FMOD_RESULT F_API FMOD_System_Set3DRolloffCallback      (FMOD_SYSTEM *system, FMOD_3D_ROLLOFF_CALLBACK callback);
/home/mike/code/FMOD/fmodstudioapi20313linux/api//core/inc/fmod_common.h:typedef float       (F_CALL *FMOD_3D_ROLLOFF_CALLBACK)      (FMOD_CHANNELCONTROL *channelcontrol, float distance);
/home/mike/code/FMOD/fmodstudioapi20313linux/api//core/inc/fmod.hpp:        FMOD_RESULT F_API set3DRolloffCallback    (FMOD_3D_ROLLOFF_CALLBACK callback);

which breaks on fmod_lua.c for 'F_CALLBACK'


This kind of FMOD integration wouldn't work with lovejs which builds the lua project, and web builds don't dynamically include
dlls, so unless you fork lovejs and integrate FMOD into it then it ain't gonna work
